query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by bygningid ascending.

2.description: select buildings in the municipality with geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge (buildings ⋂ stormflo)

6.description: from step5 keep those that also intersect flood zones (step5 ⋂ flomsoner)

7.description: count intersections per bygningid and keep bygningid

10.description: return bygningid (and count) for final output
